category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a command-line music player client for MPD; official client page says mpc is a minimalist command-line interface to MPD.
display_name_sources: Official Music Player Daemon client page heading is mpc; source_facts.name is mpc.
docs_sources: Official mpc client page links to Documentation hosted at musicpd.org/doc/mpc/html/.
repo_sources: Official mpc client page links to a git repository; linked GitHub repository is MusicPlayerDaemon/mpc.
tags_sources: Official client page describes a command-line interface to MPD; official GitHub README calls it a command-line client for Music Player Daemon.
